title: Where We First Met
subtitle: Just Long Enough to Matter
description: Ethan Carter is a quiet nineteen-year-old artist who notices the world in details most people miss. Cassandra Hale is a bright, spontaneous redhead who lives like every moment matters. When their paths cross near a small town park, an ordinary day becomes the beginning of something neither of them expected. But Cassandra is carrying a secret that will slowly change the meaning of every moment they share.
shortDescription: A clean, emotional romance about first love, hidden pain, and the moments that matter most.

mainCharacters.name: Ethan Carter
mainCharacters.description: A freelance artist with a quiet soul, awkward charm, and a habit of seeing beauty where others rush past it.

mainCharacters.name: Cassandra Hale
mainCharacters.description: A playful, red-haired girl who loves arcades, iced coffee, and spontaneous moments, while quietly carrying a life-altering secret.

author: StoryWeaver

chapters.title: Passing Lines
chapters.mood: Where an ordinary morning quietly changes everything.

chapters.title: The Pull Between Moments
chapters.mood: The kind of day that doesn't ask permission before becoming important.
